description_long: This is a single-story OXXO convenience store with a flat, gray roof and a prominent red fascia running along the top edge of the building. The front facade features large glass windows and a double glass entrance door, framed in yellow, allowing visibility into the brightly lit interior. The OXXO logo is mounted above the entrance in bold red and yellow, making the store easily recognizable. The exterior walls are primarily dark gray brick, with a section of lighter stonework at the base and a sidewalk running along the front. A blue handicap parking space is marked directly in front of the entrance, indicating accessibility. The overall design is functional and modern, typical of urban convenience stores.
description: A modern OXXO convenience store with a flat roof, red fascia, large glass windows, and a prominent logo above the glass entrance doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the OXXO logo, glass entrance doors, large display windows, and a handicap parking space.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, unadorned gray brick wall and the red fascia, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain gray brick wall and the flat roof, with no signage, windows, or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the glass windows and doors, red fascia, and part of the sidewalk and handicap parking space.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large OXXO logo sign in red, yellow, and white, mounted above the entrance, non-illuminated, rectangular, and centered on the red fascia.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Double glass swinging doors with metal frames, high transparency, and visible vertical handles.
attribute_display_windows: Large, clear glass display windows flanking the entrance, framed in yellow, with visible advertisements and product displays inside.
